Description: AD Health Check configuration - calibrated for Beta 1.1

Comments: 5 Critical issues = 75 penalty points -> Score ~25 (F grade). Was 10pts each = 50pts = Score 50.
3 Medium issues  = 9 penalty points  -> Combined with 5 criticals: Score ~16
This makes scores meaningful: a healthy AD gets 90+, a broken one gets <50
DatabaseVerbosity: Database stub warnings are now logged at Verbose level only.
This suppresses the 'Connection is null' console noise from DatabaseOperations.ps1
